title: Tensura Expanded
description: An addon for tensura reincarnated that adds new things.
body:
Tensura Expanded is a addon that adds new things to Tensura Reincarnated

Config to change skills and EP required to evolve.

Config to disable certain evolutions.

Currently adds 3 race lines, 1 alternate evolution line for goblin, 1 new evolution for Hobgoblin Saint and 1 intrinsic skill.

Playable Races/Evolutions

Blessed Slime
Dark Goblin
Dark Ogre
Goblina 
Divine Hobgoblin

Intrinsic Skills
Dragon Spirit Haki

This addon is a WIP and things can change and be modified in the future.
